page.content: The report outlines the parameters and settings of a neural network in Table 1, detailing the total number of network layers as 3 layers, the number of hidden layers as 1 hidden layer, the number of neurons in the hidden layer as 4 neurons, the training function as trainlm, and the learning rate as 0.001. Table 2 provides a comprehensive analysis of various samples with specific compositions.

page.content: Sample S1 comprises 20 of 1st Quality Wool, 80 of 2nd Quality Wool, a density of 0 Kg/m3, a weight of 30 g/m2, a nominal thickness of 1500 mm, and a test thickness of 43 mm. Sample S2 consists of 20 of 1st Quality Wool, 40 of 2nd Quality Wool, a density of 40 Kg/m3, a weight of 30 g/m2, a nominal thickness of 1500 mm, and a test thickness of 53 mm. Sample S3 includes 20 of 1st Quality Wool, 40 of 2nd Quality Wool, a density of 40 Kg/m3, a weight of 25 g/m2, a nominal thickness of 1250 mm, and a test thickness of 43 mm. Sample S4 contains 20 of 1st Quality Wool, 40 of 2nd Quality Wool, a density of 40 Kg/m3, a weight of 30 g/m2, a nominal thickness of 1200 mm, and a test thickness of 53 mm. Sample S5 has 20 of 1st Quality Wool, 40 of 2nd Quality Wool, a density of 40 Kg/m3, a weight of 30 g/m2, a nominal thickness of 1800 mm, and a test thickness of 55 mm. Sample S6 includes 20 of 1st Quality Wool, 40 of 2nd Quality Wool, a density of 40 Kg/m3, a weight of 40 g/m2, a nominal thickness of 2000 mm, and a test thickness of 54 mm. Finally, Sample S7 consists of 20 of 1st Quality Wool, 0 of 2nd Quality Wool, a density of 80 Kg/m3, a weight of 30 g/m2, a nominal thickness of 1500 mm, and a test thickness of 44 mm.
